target_event: Riverton waterfront flood barrier plan revised after public comments
event_chain: residents raise access and cost concerns
candidate_rationales: Resident concerns about access and household costs were part of the public feedback that preceded the revised city plan.

evidence.text: Residents at the public comment session said the draft waterfront flood barrier could limit riverfront access and shift costs to nearby households. A speaker listed contact details as [REDACTED_EMAIL] and [REDACTED_PHONE] in the posted transcript.

metadata.event: residents raise access and cost concerns
metadata.raw_page_title: Residents question flood barrier access plan

evidence.text: City engineers said the revised flood barrier plan keeps the core protection goal while adding wider pedestrian openings and a cost review requested during public comments.

target_event: Riverton small businesses respond to revised flood barrier construction timeline
event_chain: business association requests clearer detour plan
candidate_rationales: After the city revised the plan and delayed construction, businesses supported the extra time but requested clearer detour planning.

evidence.text: The downtown business association welcomed the delayed construction timeline but asked the city to publish clearer detour signs before work begins. The forum export included a sample ID [REDACTED_ID] that should not be stored.

metadata.event: business association requests clearer detour plan
